untranslatable_reason: Signal requires advanced statistical techniques (Johansen cointegration test, eigenvector hedge ratios, Z-Score portfolio construction, half-life mean reversion measurement) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns). These require custom portfolio construction and statistical analysis beyond indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: This signal is a sophisticated pairs/portfolio trading strategy requiring: (1) Johansen cointegration testing across multiple series, (2) Eigenvector calculation for hedge ratios, (3) Stationary portfolio formation, (4) Z-Score normalization of the constructed portfolio, and (5) Half-life measurement for mean reversion prediction. The allowed indicator set does not support multivariate statistical analysis, custom portfolio construction, or Z-Score metrics. A backtest engine would require custom modules for cointegration analysis and portfolio construction to implement this strategy.
